comments.author: 6biz
comments.body:
There is no 100% win rate on here

Yes, saw and made those bots myself in dozens - anyone can make it even with an MA cross, called overfitting of data 

Op was asked if demo or live, he said “real”, that’s backtest - not even demo :D

These backtests are complete bullshit. Sharpe ratios of 2.5+ across all periods - you have that - you don’t sell that. This backtest includes no fees, slippage, or execution reality.

No data shared to back it up, no trade list, nothing.
